downstream_consumers: future metrics pipeline (issue #28, not yet built) -- expected to import retrieve_documents from all baseline arms (vector_rag.py, vector_rag_rerank.py, graphrag_lite.py) uniformly
risk_notes: Live-Ollama tests depend on a reachable local Ollama server with llama3.1:8b pulled; skipped (not failed) if unreachable, matching 5.2.1/5.2.2 convention -- verified reachable in this environment during architecture-discovery.

Entity extraction is LLM-prompted (non-deterministic in principle even at temperature=0.0 across model/hardware versions); mitigated the same way 5.2.2 mitigates its own reranking-determinism risk -- disclosed as an open item for the verifier, not hidden.
No new pip dependency added; agents/pyproject.toml is unmodified (verified by git diff after implementation).
